title: thevetia humboldtii
intro: Thevetia humboldtii, also known as the Yellow Oleander, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Thevetia humboldtii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, but caution is advised due to its toxicity and potential side effects, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
